topic_text: When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Turn off using WeMo Smart Plug. At sunset, turn off the pool filter-chlorinator. Use WeMo rules or IFTTT Calendar Applets to turn the pump on and at sunset to turn it off Runs longer in summer and shorter in winter, which is good.
When Sunrise from Weather Underground, do Turn off using WeMo Smart Plug. Turn off WeMo Switch at sunrise.. This is nice for a lamp.
When Sunrise from Weather Underground, do Turn off using WeMo Smart Plug. Turn off light at Sunrise. Simple recipe to turn lights connected to wemo switch off at sunrise.

When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Turn on using WIFIPLUG. Turn on your lights when the sun sets. Timer plugs set the same time everyday, using this rule you can change the lighting to work in real time with the sun

When Sunrise from Weather Underground, do Turn off using WIFIPLUG. Turn off the lights when the sun rises. Timer plugs set the same time everyday, using this rule you can change the lighting to work in real time with the sun
When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Turn on using WeMo Lighting. Turn on porch light at sunset. Turn on your WEMO Smart LED Porch light at sunset every day.
When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Turn on using WeMo Lighting. Turn on specific WeMo light at sunset. Turn on a specific WeMo light at sunset.

When Sunrise from Weather Underground, do Turn off a group of lights using WeMo Lighting. Turn off WeMo lighting group at sunrise. This will turn off a WeMo lighting group within 15 minutes of sunrise in your area.
When Every day at from Date & Time, do Power off device using Energenie Mi|Home. Turn off Energenie device every day at specific time. Used to turn off Energenie device every day at specified time.

When Wind speed rises above from Netatmo Weather Station, do Close a relay using LightwaveRF Power. Close the sunblind in high winds. Use Netatmo wind speed monitor to trigger a sunblind controlled by a LightwaveRF relay.

When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Close a relay using LightwaveRF Power. Close a LightwaveRF Relay when it's sunset. When it is sunset at my location, close a LightwaveRF Relay device such as electric curtains

When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Dim lights using Philips Hue. If Sunset than turn on light with dim or brighten hue lights to a value between 0-100.. If Sunset that turn on light with dim or brighten hue lights to a value between 0-100.
When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Change color using Philips Hue. At #sunset, change all #Philips #Hue lights to #color light red. To help with better sleep, eliminate blue wavelengths

When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Change color using Philips Hue. Change light color to orange at sunset. Inspired by f.lux and http://www.tannerhelland.com/4435/convert-temperature-rgb-algorithm-code/ I wanted to change my light to a color with the temperature 3400KTurned out to be R:255 G:193 B:132 or #FFC184.
When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Switch on using SmartThings. If sunset, then Switch on Front Porch using SmartThings. If sunset, then Switch on Front Porch using SmartThings
When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Turn on lights using Philips Hue. Lights on 30min before sunset. Will turn on lights 30min befor sunset
When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Turn on lights using Philips Hue. Sun down, light up!. Turn the lights on when the sun goes down.
When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Turn on lights using Philips Hue. Turn on my lights at sunset. This will automatically turm on the lights you select at sunset.

When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Turn on lights using Philips Hue. Turn on hue lights at sunset. Only works with the Philips Hue lights, but helps ensure you have a nicely lit house to come home to.
When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Turn on lights using Philips Hue. Turn on my lights at sunset. No need to get up when the room gets dark, save those calories!

When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Turn on lights using Philips Hue. Welcome home light. Better in summer, lights go on when it's darkIn winter where the day is shorter, use time to save energy.
When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Turn on color loop using Philips Hue. Color loop at sunset. Your selected hue lights start to color loop at sunset

When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Turn on color loop using Philips Hue. Christmas Tree Color Loop at Sunset. We have a single can light above our Christmas treeWe prefer a more traditional all-white light lookTurning on a color loop above the tree adds a bit of whimsy and is a nice effect.
When Event from MESH app received from MESH, do Turn on using WeMo Smart Plug. Turn on the lights when it gets dark. This Applet uses the MESH Brightness Tag.

When Sunrise from Weather Underground, do Turn off lights using Philips Hue. Don't waste power on porch lights during the day!. Set it up so that you can save some green by not trying to out shine the sun!
When Sunrise from Weather Underground, do Turn off lights using Philips Hue. Rise and Shine.... Lights will slowly awaken to a soft yellow.
When Sunrise from Weather Underground, do Turn lights off using LIFX. Turn Lights Off at Sunrise. This lets natural light take over in the morning and helps save energy.
When Sunrise from Weather Underground, do Turn lights off using LIFX. Turn lights off at sunrise. Fades your LIFX bulbs off when the sun rises in your area

When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Change color of lights using LIFX. Warm lights at Sunset.. At sunset in your location this recipe will slowly turn on all of the LIFX bulbs in the house and change their colour to a lovely warm white, this will occur over about 15 minutes so you barely even notice it happening Very lovely.

When Sunrise from Weather Underground, do Change color of lights using LIFX. Change lights in the house to daylight at sunrise.. This recipe works out when sunrises in your area, and then slowly brings up all of the lights in your house to a cool white colour emulating daylight Very nice way to wake up.
When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Send a command using openHAB. Turn on lights at Sunset. Within 15 min of Sunset: Turn on lights!
When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Activate scene using LIFX. When the sunsets, activate my scene. When the sunsets, activate my scene
When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Activate scene using LIFX. If sunset, then activate LIFX Scene. Create scene using your LIFX lights that has a warm yellow glow to align circadian rhythm
When Sunrise from Weather Underground, do Activate scene using LIFX. When the sunrises activate LIFX scene. Wake up when the sunrises with your favorite light settings.
When Sunrise from Weather Underground, do Activate scene using LIFX. If sunrise, then activate LIFX Scene. Create scene using your LIFX lights that has a cool blue glow to align circadian rhythm

When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Turn on light using LightwaveRF Lighting. Turn on a LightwaveRF Dimmer at sunset. Within 15 minutes of your locations sunset a LightwaveRF dimmer of your choice will switch on

When Sunrise from Weather Underground, do Turn off light using LightwaveRF Lighting. Turn off lights at Sunrise. Use IFTTT to turn off your outdoor lights when the sun comes up
When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Dim a light using LightwaveRF Lighting. Switch Porch Light ON at Sunset. Switch ON a LightwaveRF light at sunset
When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Dim a light using LightwaveRF Lighting. Bring lights up at sunset. At sunset, bring lights up to 40%Useful for dark porches and hallways.

When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Turn on lights using Philips Hue. If 1 hour before sunset in London, turn on all lights.. You will need to offset your location in the weather app to achieve thisFor 1 Hour before sunrise in London use Warsaw, Poland as your location.
When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Turn on lights using Philips Hue. Turn on Hue Lamp on sunset. You dont want to leave your pets in the dark? Then this Applet is for you...

When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Turn on lights using Philips Hue. turn on lights at sunrise. turn on lights at sunrise

When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Turn on lights using Philips Hue. Shine on me when sunset!. Turn lights on when world gets dark.
When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Turn on lights using Philips Hue. Afraid of the dark. This will turn your lights on within 15 minutes of your local sunsetvia the Weather Channel.
When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Turn on lights using Philips Hue. At sunset, activate all lights. This simple recipe turns on your lights at sunset

When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Send a command using openHAB. Close Rollershutters at Sunset. Tired of manually shutting down Rollershutters or switching on the garden lights at sunset? This recipe helps automating this task for you!
When Sunrise from Weather Underground, do Change color using ORBneXt. Wake up with sunrise light. Change the light to sunrise likely to welcome you have a new day.
When Sunrise from Weather Underground, do Brew coffee using WeMo Coffeemaker. Freshly brewed coffee every morning. At sunrise, set MrCoffee to brew.

When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Call a function using Particle. Turn on roof lights at sunset. Turn Christmas roof lights on at sunset using a Particle Internet Button and a 433 MHz transmitter

When Sunrise from Weather Underground, do Change color of lights using LIFX. Change Light Color at Sunrise. On my pc the color shifts to a more yellow in the evening to keep me from being to awake when I need to sleep, I set this to change the light color to be more blue in the morning

When Current condition changes to from Weather Underground, do Activate Multiple Room Scene using Hunter Douglas PowerView. If Rain then Shut Shades. Works with multi room scenes from Hunter Douglas Basically I put all my shades in a scene and when it rains the shades will be set to shut.
When Current UV index rises above from Weather Underground, do Execute scene using IntesisHome. Power on at sunshine. switch your AC to powermode if sun is shining
When Sunrise from Weather Underground, do Turn lights off using LIFX. If sunrise, then turn lights off. Turns lights off when the sun comes up
When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Turn lights on using LIFX. Lights on at Sunset. Needed a way to make sure there are lights on when we got home each night.

When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Turn lights on using LIFX. Lights on at sunset. Have the lights turn on at sunsetMakes it easy to always have light when you come home.Adjust light settings before activating.

When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Change color of lights using LIFX. Dim your lights to a golden glow when the sun sets. Never miss the sunset, even if you're indoorsThis Applet will fade your lights to a golden glow when the sun is setting.

When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Change color of lights using LIFX. When the sun sets, switch light on to a random color.. Create a different mood every night! Switches on at 50% brightness which offers the most vivid hue.

When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Activate scene using LIFX. As the sun goes down, fade on the lights. At sunset turn on and change color of lights to greet the 'blue hour', when everything outside gets a blueish shade.
